title: Weave Plugin Platform (custom plugin drawing into its own layer)

chart.options: chart: { id: 'weaveChart', height: 380, type: 'line', animations: { enabled: true }, toolbar: { show: false }, }, colors: ['#0e9d9a'], stroke: { curve: 'smooth', width: 3 }, markers: { size: 4 }, title: { text: 'Series with a plugin-drawn mean line', align: 'left' }, subtitle: { text: 'The mean line comes from a Weave plugin, not the chart config', align: 'left' }, xaxis: { categories: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8] }, plugins: [ { name: 'mean-line' } ],
